info.description:
# Introduction
The Developer API allows our more advanced users to interact with Mix It Up using external or customized programs. To use this feature, ensure the Developer API is enabled on the Services page. All APIs are REST-like endpoints that you can perform calls receiving/using JSON text. All endpoints begin with the base address of http://localhost:8911/api/v2/
info.title: Mix It Up Developer API

get.summary: Gets a list of all commands with pagination

parameters.name: skip
parameters.description: How many commands to skip

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The total number of commands to return

get.summary: Gets a specific command by ID

parameters.name: commandId
parameters.description: The command ID to query

parameters.name: commandId
parameters.description: The command ID to run

parameters.name: commandId
parameters.description: The command ID to update

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: The state to update the command to (0 = Disable, 1 = Enable, 2 = Toggle)

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem

ID.description: The Mix It Up User ID

LastActivity.description: The last date time of activity

LastUpdated.description: The last date time of updates

OnlineViewingMinutes.description: The total number of online viewing minutes in your stream

IsSpecialtyExcluded.description: Whether the user is a specialty excluded user

CurrencyAmounts.description: Map of currency IDs to amounts

InventoryAmounts.description: Map of inventory IDs to item amounts

StreamPassAmounts.description: Map of stream pass IDs to amounts

ID.description: The Mix It Up currency ID

Name.description: The Mix It Up currency name

Amount.description: The amount to adjust or set the user's currency. For PATCH operations, this can be positive (add) or negative (subtract). For PUT operations, this sets the absolute value.

ID.description: The Mix It Up inventory ID

Name.description: The Mix It Up inventory name

ID.description: The Mix It Up inventory item ID

Name.description: The Mix It Up inventory item name

Amount.description: The amount of this item the user has
The amount to adjust or set the user's inventory item. For PATCH operations, this can be positive (add) or negative (subtract). For PUT operations, this sets the absolute value.

Name.description: The name for the new counter

Amount.description: The value to set the counter to
The amount to add to the counter (defaults to 1 if not provided). Can be negative to subtract.

ID.description: The Mix It Up command ID

Name.description: The Mix It Up command name

Type.description: The Mix It Up command type

Unlocked.description: Whether the command is unlocked or not

GroupName.description: The name of the group the command belongs to, if any

Platform.description: The streaming platform to run the command for

SpecialIdentifiers.description: Special identifiers replacements to pass to the command

IgnoreRequirements.description: If true, bypasses all command requirements (cooldowns, roles, costs). Defaults to false.

Message.description: The message to send to chat
Message.example: This is a test of the emergency broadcast system!

Platform.description: The streaming platform to send the message to (e.g., Twitch, YouTube, All)

SendAsStreamer.description: True will force the message to send as the streamer. False will try to send as the registered bot, if available.
